sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85609" key="polfofa/kh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολφοφάκη</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n85609.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dish of macaroni and pulse,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.61</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
